PROF. DR. NURETTIN ALI BERKOL ANATOMICAL MODEL HALL

In addition to the opportunity for each student to perform dissection on real cadavers, our rich collection of anatomical models provides our students with the opportunity to review information and visual study independently of cadaveric sessions.

Our selected models, which offer the highest quality of detail, are prepared for structures that are difficult to understand other than standard models, enlarged or specially cut, creating a valuable opportunity for our students to better understand the structure of the human body.

Prof. Dr. Nurettin Ali BERKOL Anatomy Model Laboratory is used by the following departments:

Anatomy
